free_text: Isobaric analog resonances in the 82Se+p system
investigated by (p,p'g) angular correlations and
low-lying states in 83Se
Department of Physics, Faculty of Science
Beam intensity is 30 to 50 nA.
- Target enrichment is 88%.
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
1. DWBA (Distorted wave Born approximation)
2. Optical model
3. Resonance theory
Nh
ANG is polar angle (lab.) between beam and proton
- Target-thickness is 0.017 mg/cm**2.
- Backing is aluminium.
